seoTitle: Hamley vs Hammond — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hamley and Hammond. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hamley and Hammond.
heading: Hamley vs Hammond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hamley, South Australia and Hammond, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hammond has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hamley (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hamley or Hammond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hamley has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Hammond scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hamley scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Hammond scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hamley or Hammond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hammond has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
